span.p: Component View: WORKSTATION1 Workflow Backup - Backup Orchestrator

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Reads ZFS used, available,
usedbysnapshots, and snapshot
count from

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Initializes log and status
paths for

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Records skipped_lock when
another run is active

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Snapshots ledger DB and
exports run history from

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Creates the local state/log
directories, acquires a flock
lock, generates run_id, and
skips concurrent runs
silently.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Writes per-run logs and
last-run.json with host,
status, duration, dry-run,
error, and log path.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Appends
started/completed/failed/skipped
events with SQLite and
Windows manifest summaries.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Invokes
check-nas-growth-guard.sh
before and after writes and
fails closed on budget
violations.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Exports the run ledger to
JSON/SQLite snapshots and
writes last-run/run-history
manifests to NAS.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Converts command failures
into failed status, ledger
event, best-effort NAS status
sync, and nonzero service
exit.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Read-only ZFS budget check
that enforces dataset-used,
snapshot-held, free-space,
and snapshot-count limits
before/after writes.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div: [Container: SQLite + JSON + logs on WSL filesystem]

Local status, logs, SQLite
run ledger, exported
run-history JSON, SQLite
snapshot cache, and Windows
manifest cache under
~/.local/state/workstation-workflow-backup.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Encrypted TrueNAS dataset
v1/ws1/wf with current mirror
tree, manifests, SMB share
ws1-wf, and ZFS snapshot
history.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div: TrueNAS Middleware and ZFS Control Plane

root@10.99.98.221 management
surface used for ZFS
properties, snapshot tasks,
SMB share configuration, and
verification.
